2603.24051.title: FinToolSyn: A forward synthesis Framework for Financial Tool-Use Dialogue Data with Dynamic Tool Retrieval
2603.24051.paper_summary: Tool-use capabilities are vital for Large Language Models (LLMs) in finance, a domain characterized by massive investment targets and data-intensive inquiries. However, existing data synthesis methods typically rely on a reverse synthesis paradigm, generating user queries from pre-sampled tools. This approach inevitably introduces artificial explicitness, yielding queries that fail to capture the implicit, event-driven nature of real-world needs. Moreover, its reliance on static tool sets overlooks the dynamic retrieval process required to navigate massive tool spaces. To address these challenges, we introduce \textit{FinToolSyn}, a forward synthesis framework designed to generate high-quality financial dialogues. Progressing from persona instruction and atomic tool synthesis to dynamic retrieval dialogue generation, our pipeline constructs a repository of 43,066 tools and synthesizes over 148k dialogue instances, incorporating dynamic retrieval to emulate the noisy candidate sets typical of massive tool spaces. We also establish a dedicated benchmark to evaluate tool-calling capabilities in realistic financial scenarios. Extensive experiments demonstrate that models trained on FinToolSyn achieve a 21.06\% improvement, providing a robust foundation for tool learning in financial scenarios.
2603.24051.paper_summary_zh: 工具使用能力對於金融領域的大型語言模型（LLMs）至關重要，該領域的特點是龐大的投資目標和數據密集型的查詢。<lb/>然而，現有的數據合成方法通常依賴於反向合成範式，從預先抽樣的工具生成用戶查詢。<lb/>這種方法不可避免地引入了人工的明確性，產生的查詢未能捕捉真實世界需求的隱含事件驅動特性。<lb/>此外，其對靜態工具集的依賴忽視了在龐大的工具空間中導航所需的動態檢索過程。<lb/>為了解決這些挑戰，我們介紹了\textit{FinToolSyn}，這是一個旨在生成高品質金融對話的前向合成框架。<lb/>我們的管道從角色指令和原子工具合成進展到動態檢索對話生成，構建了一個包含43,066個工具的庫，並合成了超過148,000個對話實例，結合動態檢索以模擬典型於龐大工具空間的噪聲候選集。<lb/>我們還建立了一個專門的基準來評估在現實金融場景中調用工具的能力。<lb/>廣泛的實驗表明，在FinToolSyn上訓練的模型實現了21.06\%的改進，為金融場景中的工具學習提供了堅實的基礎。
2603.24051.author: Caishuang Huang et.al.
2603.24051.authors: Caishuang Huang, Yang Qiao, Rongyu Zhang, Junjie Ye, Pu Lu, Wenxi Wu, Meng Zhou, Xiku Du, Tao Gui, Qi Zhang, Xuanjing Huang
